title: Elastic NV (ESTC) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights
text: Elastic (ESTC) Q4 2025 Earnings Results and Guidance. Financial Results: Total revenue was $388 million, an increase of 16% year-over-year. Elastic Cloud revenue was $182 million, an increase of 23% year-over-year. Non-GAAP diluted earnings per share was $0.47, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.37 per share, representing an earnings surprise of 27.03%. Customer Metrics: Total customer count with ACV greater than $100,000 was over 1,510 compared to over 1,460 in Q3 FY25 and over 1,330 in Q4 FY24. Fiscal Year 2025 Performance: Total revenue was $1.483 billion, an increase of 17% year-over-year. Non-GAAP Operating Margin was 15% for both Q4 and fiscal year 2025. Adjusted Free Cash Flow Margin of 19% for fiscal year 2025. Forward Outlook: The company is approaching FY26 guidance with prudence due to potential macroeconomic uncertainties. Despite strong performance, management acknowledges potential uncertainty amidst evolving macro conditions. Management noted that they had a strong Q4 despite US public sector pressure, with guidance reflecting a balance between positive demand signals and macro uncertainty.
